title: Reference Tab - Do not Delete

source.file: input_data/corpus/20200803 PC-Strategy-Solution Development and GoToMarket PlanVer1.5.xlsx

summary: Reference/data-validation backing tab (named 'Do not Delete') holding solution abbreviation codes and cell-range references (e.g., C21:C24) used to populate dropdown lists elsewhere in the workbook, alongside supporting lists of solution feature names. It is scaffolding for the workbook, not an analyzable table.
warnings: reference / data-validation scaffold tab; primary column holds cell-range references, not entity data
